scripts.build: pnpm --filter @gorenku/studio-diagnostics build && pnpm --filter @gorenku/studio-core build && pnpm --filter @gorenku/studio-cli build && pnpm --filter @gorenku/studio-engines build && pnpm --filter @gorenku/studio build
scripts.lint: pnpm --filter @gorenku/studio-diagnostics lint && pnpm --filter @gorenku/studio-core lint && pnpm --filter @gorenku/studio-cli lint && pnpm --filter @gorenku/studio-engines lint && pnpm --filter @gorenku/studio lint
scripts.type-check: pnpm --filter @gorenku/studio-diagnostics type-check && pnpm --filter @gorenku/studio-core type-check && pnpm --filter @gorenku/studio-cli type-check && pnpm --filter @gorenku/studio-engines type-check
scripts.test: pnpm --filter @gorenku/studio-diagnostics test && pnpm --filter @gorenku/studio-core test && pnpm --filter @gorenku/studio-cli test && pnpm --filter @gorenku/studio-engines test && pnpm --filter @gorenku/studio test
scripts.test:typecheck: pnpm --filter @gorenku/studio-diagnostics test:typecheck && pnpm --filter @gorenku/studio-core test:typecheck && pnpm --filter @gorenku/studio-cli test:typecheck && pnpm --filter @gorenku/studio-engines test:typecheck && pnpm --filter @gorenku/studio test:typecheck
scripts.check: pnpm type-check && pnpm test:typecheck && pnpm lint
